cases.name: content-altered
cases.note: claimed scope widened; recomputed canonical hash no longer matches receipt_hash

cases.name: lying-issuer-untrusted
cases.note: attacker re-canonicalizes, re-hashes and re-signs under the trusted key_id with an untrusted key

cases.name: lying-issuer-trusted-key
cases.note: compromised-key model: receipt proof valid over tampered evidence; the evidence event hash exposes it

cases.name: evidence-signature-stale
cases.note: evidence re-hashed but its event signature is stale

cases.name: claim-hidden-obligation
cases.note: an inherited obligation is not declared — lineage completeness

cases.name: claim-invented-obligation
cases.note: a claimed obligation has no inheritance event

cases.name: constitution-claim-dropped
cases.note: a v0.2 receipt requires the constitution claim

cases.name: genesis-evidence-stripped
cases.note: the constitutional lineage root must be in evidence

cases.name: amendment-count-inflated
cases.note: amendments_ratified must recount from the AmendmentRatified events in evidence

cases.name: ledger-binding-hash-swapped
cases.note: ledger_binding.event_hash must be the final evidence event (the horizon), not an earlier one

cases.name: ledger-binding-height-understated
cases.note: height below the evidence count cannot be a valid horizon position

cases.name: spec-version-unknown
cases.note: verifiers reject spec_version values they do not implement

cases.name: v01-label-smuggling
cases.note: published versions are never mutated — a v0.1 receipt must not carry v0.2 claims
